source: OCR-assisted analysis of rotor brake, MGB bar, bi-directional suspension, and engine or MGB drive-line manuals
note: This catalog records the recovered AMM families for the newly supplied inspection-criteria and fault-isolation PDFs analyzed on April 20, 2026. OCR was performed locally using the repo extractor with Windows OCR fallback where image-only PDFs had no embedded text.
